map.noWater: No body of water nearby! (Look for blue areas)
map.noForest: No forest nearby! (Look for green areas)
map.campfire_ignited: You ignited the campfire with wood and flint!
map.need_flint: You need a flint to ignite this campfire.

garrosh.start: Ah, a traveler! My fire is almost out and I am running low on iron.
garrosh.ask_trade: Bring me iron ore from the mines.
garrosh.accept_quest: Return when you have the ore.
garrosh.info: I am Garrosh the blacksmith. Bring me iron ore so I can fuel my forge and craft you some proper equipment.
garrosh.opt_tell_more: What exactly do you need for the forge?
garrosh.opt_help: I will get the iron ore for you.

common.quest_completed: I have already done what I could.
common.partial_turn_in: Thanks for %{amount}x %{item}, but I still need %{remaining}!

alkuin.start: The pestilence is spreading, we urgently need herbs.
alkuin.ask_trade: Find healing roots in the woods.
alkuin.check_quest_progress: Ah, my friend! Have you gathered the mushrooms for me?
alkuin.complete_quest: Wonderful! These mushrooms will greatly assist my studies. Take these coins as thanks.
alkuin.quest_already_completed: Thank you again for your help with the mushrooms. My research is making good progress!
alkuin.info: I am Monk Alkuin. I urgently need mushrooms and healing roots from the forest to brew a cure against this terrible pestilence.
alkuin.opt_tell_more: What kind of herbs are you looking for?
alkuin.opt_help: I'll find the healing roots in the forest.

leif.start: Lately, bandits have been roaming outside the gates.
leif.ask_trade: The captain pays gold for the leader's amulet.
leif.check_quest_progress: Halt! Do you have the wood we need for the barricade?
leif.complete_quest: Excellent. With this we can make the road a bit safer. Here is your reward.
leif.quest_already_completed: The barricade holds. Thanks again for the wood!
leif.info: Guard Leif here. I am looking for volunteers to gather wood for the barricades or help fight the bandits outside the gates.
leif.opt_help: I'll get the wood for the barricades.

beggar.start: Do you have any bread or salt for me?
beggar.info: Please... I am starving. Do you perhaps have a piece of bread or some salt for me?
beggar.opt_help: I will try to find some food.

barista.start: Welcome to the cafe! Need some caffeine?
barista.info: Hey, I'm the barista. If you give me your excess water, I'll brew you a hot, energizing coffee.
barista.opt_tell_more: Coffee? What do you want in return?
barista.opt_help: Deal, I'll bring you the water.

trader.start: Need supplies? I have everything you need.
trader.info: I am a trader. If you have the necessary coins, I'll offer you my best supplies in exchange.
trader.opt_tell_more: What do you have for sale?

informant.start: Psst! I know things... for the right price.
informant.ask_trade: Give me coins and I'll talk.
informant.info: Psst... I know things no one else knows. For a few copper coins, I'll share my secrets with you.
informant.opt_tell_more: What kind of secrets do you know?
informant.opt_help: Here are the coins, let's hear it.

map.need_flint_and_wood: You need wood and a flint to ignite this campfire.
map.need_more_items: You don't have anything I could use.

quests.rest_stop_desc: Rest for a moment and search the area.
quests.hospital_run_desc: Procure urgently needed medicine from the hospital.
quests.lost_knowledge_desc: Recover ancient records from the library.
quests.park_patrol_desc: Clear the park of mutated animals.
quests.ruin_scavenge_desc: Search the ruins for usable scrap.
quests.museum_artifact_desc: Find a rare artifact in the old museum.
quests.bus_stop_ambush_desc: Survive the ambush at the bus stop.
quests.sanctuary_desc: Check if this place can serve as a sanctuary.
quests.stadium_horde_desc: Eliminate the nest on the sports field.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.traded_iron: You gave Garrosh iron and received a sword!
inventory.not_enough_iron: You do not have enough iron...
inventory.traded_bread: You helped and received a healing potion!
inventory.not_enough_bread: You have no bread and no salt with you...
inventory.collected_depleted: Gathered %{amount}x %{name}! The resource is now depleted.

chest.title: Hidden Chest
chest.desc: A mysterious chest with unknown contents.
chest.locked_desc: This chest is tightly locked. You need a lockpick to open it.

survival.drink_dirty_water: You drink dirty water... You feel sick. (+10 Thirst, -15 Hunger)
survival.eat_berries: You eat some berries. (+15 Hunger, +5 Thirst)
survival.eat_roasted_meat: You eat roasted meat. (+40 Hunger, -5 Thirst)
survival.drink_herbal_tea: You drink hot herbal tea. (+40 Thirst, heals slightly)
survival.drink_healing_potion: You drink a healing potion! Wounds close.
survival.drink_dirty_water_sick: You drink dirty water... You feel sick. (+10 Thirst, -15 Hunger)
survival.drink_dirty_water_safe: You drink dirty water. It tastes awful, but you stay healthy. (+10 Thirst)
survival.eat_mushrooms_poisonous: You eat a poisonous mushroom! You feel terribly sick... (-10 Hunger, -10 Thirst)
survival.eat_mushrooms_safe: You eat tasty forest mushrooms. (+20 Hunger)
survival.eat_bread: You eat the fresh bread. It is very filling!

questlog.title: Journal
questlog.empty: You have no quests in this category yet.
questlog.quest_accepted: New quest accepted! Check your journal.

roles.title: Choose your Specialization
roles.subtitle: Your choice will permanently affect your journey in the apocalypse.
